title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at MyGlamm - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MyGlamm! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MyGlamm:
MyGlamm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
